title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Wind Advisory
summary:
* WHAT...South winds 35 to 45 mph, with gusts up to 60 to 75 mph
expected.

* WHERE...Unalaska and Nikolski.

* WHEN...Until 4 PM AKDT Sunday.

* IMPACTS...Gusty winds will blow around unsecured objects and a few
power outages may result.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...The first of two rounds of strong southerly
winds will end later this afternoon, with a second round of
southerly winds arriving late ...
sourceAttribution: Source: National Weather Service CAP Feed

title: 🚨 NWS Severe: High Wind Warning
summary:
* WHAT...Southwest winds 45 to 60 mph, with gusts up to 80 mph
expected.

* WHERE...Atka and Adak.

* WHEN...From 7 PM this evening to 4 PM AKDT Sunday.

* IMPACTS...High winds may move loose debris, damage property, and
cause power outages. Travel will be difficult.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...Southerly winds gusting 35-45 mph will become
westerly this evening as the storm center moves through. We...
sourceAttribution: Source: National Weather Service CAP Feed
